name: Candied Ginger
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Ginger Root (peeled and thinly sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, stir together the ginger, water, and maple syrup.
2. Place over medium heat and simmer until the liquid is completely evaporated, about 25 to 30 minutes. Watch carefully during the last 10 minutes of cooking to prevent the syrup from burning.
3. Remove from heat and separate the pieces on a lightly greased cooling rack.
4. Dry in an oven set to 200 degrees for about 2 hours until all syrup is absorbed and the pieces snap when broken.
